entity.summary: Multichain decentralized exchange and yield protocol built around the Nabla automated market maker, with pricing optimized for bots and autonomous agents and liquidity deployments across Arbitrum, Base, Berachain, Hyperliquid, and Monad.
entity.notes: HEI models Nabla Finance, the Nabla AMM, yield vaults, agent-facing liquidity, and all current chain deployments as one exchange entity. No exact public launch date or legal jurisdiction is inferred.

evidence.title: Nabla Finance documentation
evidence.notes: Current first-party documentation identifies Nabla Finance as a yield protocol powered by a hyper-efficient AMM and describes its agent-facing pricing, multi-asset liquidity, and impermanent-loss-reduction design.

evidence.title: Nabla Finance protocol trading metrics
evidence.notes: Independent metrics report current non-zero TVL, fees, revenue, and DEX volume across Arbitrum, Base, Berachain, Hyperliquid L1, and Monad, corroborating active operation.
